How to treat gauche-gdbm? 

===>  Building for gauche-gdbm-0.9 
cd /work/a/ports/databases/gauche-gdbm/work/dbm && /usr/local/bin/gauche-config --fixup-extension gdbm 
cd /work/a/ports/databases/gauche-gdbm/work/dbm && /usr/local/bin/gosh genstub gdbm.stub 
Couldn't read input file: "gdbm.stub" 
*** Error code 1
